titles.en: To the army officers when he was elected as the caliph
To the army officers when he was elected as the caliph

segments: ومن كتاب له (عليه السلام) لما استخلف إلى أمراء الأجناد
arabic.text: ومن كتاب له (عليه السلام) لما استخلف إلى أمراء الأجناد

segments: To the army officers when Amīr al-mu’minīn became Caliph.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: To the army officers when Amīr al-mu’minīn became Caliph.

titles.en: To the army officers when he was elected as the caliph

segments: أَمَّا بَعْدُ، فإِنَّمَا أَهْلَكَ مَنْ كَانَ قَبْلَكُمْ أَنَّهُمْ مَنَعُوا النَّاسَ الْحَقَّ فَاشْتَرَوْهُ، وَأَخَذُوهُمْ بِالْبَاطِلِ فَاقْتَدَوْهُ.
arabic.text: أَمَّا بَعْدُ، فإِنَّمَا أَهْلَكَ مَنْ كَانَ قَبْلَكُمْ أَنَّهُمْ مَنَعُوا النَّاسَ الْحَقَّ فَاشْتَرَوْهُ، وَأَخَذُوهُمْ بِالْبَاطِلِ فَاقْتَدَوْهُ.

segments: Now, what ruined those before you was that they denied people their rights and then they had to purchase them (by bribes), and they led the people to wrong and they followed it.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: Now, what ruined those before you was that they denied people their rights and then they had to purchase them (by bribes), and they led the people to wrong and they followed it.
